prompts.title: dev.kit Codex Overrides
body: - **Codex**: This prompt is intended for Codex CLI usage.
- **Normalization**: Prefer standardized repository prompts so Codex rules are normalized consistently.
- **Codex Config**: When repository skills are synchronized, assume `~/.codex/AGENTS.md` and `~/.codex/rules/default.rules` are authoritative.
